raw.objective: “to establish a population pharmacokinetic (PPK) model of valproate (VPA) in Chinese epileptic children to promote the reasonable use of anti-epileptic drugs.”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE, WT, HT, SR, Comedication (CO) Included: AGE, WT, CO, SR
raw.observations: The PPK model is established, IPRED scatter gram of final model is more accurate, showing no significant bias, symmetric distribution. V/F has an additive value, indicating it will not be accurate for small WT.
raw.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
raw.structure: one-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL = ((theta1+(theta2*CO))+(theta3*AGE))*exp(eta1) V = (theta4+(theta5*WT))*exp(eta2) KA = (theta6+theta7*(1-SR))*exp(eta3) Cobs=Cipred +eps1 AGE: Age of individual (years) WT: total body weight (kg) CO: comedication (1:yes, 0:no) SR: VPA sustained-release tablet (1:yes, 0:no) HT: height of individual (m)
raw.parameter_values: theta1= 0.106 theta2= 0.980 theta3= 0.157 theta4= 2.88 theta5= 0.157 theta6= 0.251 theta7= 2.24 omega1= 0.0631 omega2= 0.241 omega3= 0.0120 sigma1= 175
raw.validation: Yes, with a validation cohort, N=100

structural_model.description: one-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL = ((theta1+(theta2*CO))+(theta3*AGE))*exp(eta1) V = (theta4+(theta5*WT))*exp(eta2) KA = (theta6+theta7*(1-SR))*exp(eta3) Cobs=Cipred +eps1 AGE: Age of individual (years) WT: total body weight (kg) CO: comedication (1:yes, 0:no) SR: VPA sustained-release tablet (1:yes, 0:no) HT: height of individual (m)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to establish a population pharmacokinetic (PPK) model of valproate (VPA) in Chinese epileptic children to promote the reasonable use of anti-epileptic drugs.”

covariates.raw: Tested: AGE, WT, HT, SR, Comedication (CO) Included: AGE, WT, CO, SR

validation.raw: Yes, with a validation cohort, N=100

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
